abilities.effect: This Pokémon does not take damage from weather.

abilities.shortEffect: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.
abilities.effect:
This Pokémon takes 0.75× as much damage from moves that are super effective against it.

This ability functions identically to Solid Rock.
